overall.description: Cinematic drive through a post-industrial wasteland from a video game (Cyberpunk 2077), featuring an abandoned CHOOH2 gas station, massive trash mountains, and industrial smokestacks under clear golden hour lighting. The camera moves steadily along a deserted highway littered with debris and flanked by concrete barriers.

scene_state.functional_zone: abandoned fuel station at wasteland crossroads

agents.ego_description: driving past the abandoned gas station along the deserted highway, approaching the intersection

entered.detail: derelict fuel station with collapsed roof and weathered walls
tall vertical sign with illuminated CHOOH2 branding and price displays
large metal lattice electricity pylon with multiple cables
massive mountain of garbage with smoke plumes rising from the peak
tall industrial chimney emitting thick black smoke
rusted abandoned cars and trucks near the gas station

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on an abandoned CHOOH2 gas station in a post-industrial wasteland. The camera drives forward past wrecked vehicles and the derelict station, with a massive trash mountain visible in the distance and a tall industrial smokestack on the horizon. Power lines stretch across the clear golden hour sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: open wasteland highway with scattered trash piles

agents.ego_description: cruising along the empty highway with trash piles lining both sides of the road

segments.scene_description: Having left the gas station behind, the camera continues down the open wasteland highway. The trash mountain now dominates the right side of the frame while the industrial smokestack grows larger on the horizon. The road is littered with debris and flanked by scattered trash piles under the bright sun.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway with concrete barriers and graffiti

agents.ego_description: driving between red and white concrete barriers that line both sides of the road

entered.detail: red and white striped concrete traffic barriers lining the road
white painted graffiti reading NO REGRETS on the barrier

segments.scene_description: Concrete barriers now line both sides of the highway, featuring prominent graffiti. The industrial smokestack looms large on the right, emitting thick black smoke. The camera continues forward through this channelized section of road, with the trash mountain still visible in the background.

agents.ego_description: passing close by the industrial smokestack as it towers over the right side of the road

segments.scene_description: The camera drives alongside the massive industrial smokestack, passing it on the right as the barrier configuration changes. The smokestack eventually falls behind as the journey continues down the endless wasteland highway, with concrete barriers still guiding the path forward.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous drive through a post-industrial wasteland that evolves from an abandoned roadside stop into a channelized industrial corridor. It begins by passing a derelict CHOOH2 gas station and wrecked vehicles, with a distant trash mountain and a lone smokestack silhouetted against a clear golden hour sky. As the camera moves further down the open highway, the trash mountain grows to dominate the right side of the frame while the road becomes increasingly littered with debris. The scene then shifts as concrete barriers covered in graffiti begin to line both sides of the path, narrowing the view toward the looming smokestack which now emits thick black smoke. Finally, the camera drives directly alongside the massive structure before passing it on the right and continuing forward down the endless, barrier-guided highway.
